site.name: Joong Woo HRD
site.nameEnglish: Joong Woo Human Resource Development Institute
site.slogan: A global human-resources partner developing Nepali talent through local training
site.seoTitle: Nepali Talent Development and Employment Pathways to Korea and Japan
site.description: We develop Nepali talent through local vocational training and connect them lawfully and reliably with companies in Korea and Japan. We manage the full journey—from training and examinations to matching, visas, and settlement support.
site.streetAddress: 6034, 6F, Geumbo Building, 21-6 Gugal-ro 28beon-gil, Giheung-gu, Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea

header.mobileNotice: Available in six languages, including Korean.

footer.description: We develop Nepali talent through local training and connect them lawfully with companies in Korea and Japan.
footer.network: Established in June 2026; our international partner network is centered on Nepal, Vietnam, and Laos.
footer.contactNotice: Our web inquiry channel is not yet formally open. This area first provides guidance for organizing company requirements.
footer.countries: Nepal, Vietnam, Laos, Republic of Korea, Japan

metrics.title: We put only verifiable facts first
metrics.description: As a newly established company, we do not publish unverified performance figures such as placement counts or rankings.

visa.label: Visa categories and systems supported
visa.sub: Four Korean categories and Japan’s Specified Skilled Worker No. 1

countries.label: Partner countries
countries.sub: Nepal, Vietnam, Laos, Republic of Korea, and Japan

hero.title: Fair opportunities
hero.description: A corporate partner responsible for foreign talent from training and examinations through visas and settlement.
hero.alt: A vocational training setting representing local education and preparation for international mobility

intro.title: Before placement, we design training and verification
intro.description: We are a company founded in June 2026. Rather than making exaggerated claims, we clearly disclose local partners, regulatory standards, and roles at every stage.

services.title: We unite education, Korea, and Japan in one operating system
services.description: Each service area may appear separate, but in practice selection, training, examinations, visas, and settlement are connected.

partners.title: A partner’s role matters more than its name
partners.description: Rather than decorating the site with organizations whose logos are not ready, we first show the responsibilities each partner actually carries.

faq.title: Questions companies should answer first
faq.description: Foreign-worker hiring risks can be reduced by confirming the system and each party’s role first.

company.q: What kind of company is Joong Woo HRD?
company.a: Joong Woo HRD is a global human-resources development company that develops Nepali talent through local vocational training and lawfully connects it with companies in Korea and Japan.

visa.q: Which work visas and systems do you support?
visa.a: For Korea, we support E-9, E-7, D-2, and D-4. For Japan, we support Specified Skilled Worker No. 1. We review the system that fits the company’s requirements and the role. Visa Information provides each system’s requirements and procedures.

process.q: What does the hiring process look like?
process.a: The process proceeds through selection, training, examination, matching, contract and visa, arrival, and settlement. Each stage is managed with clearly assigned roles alongside local partners.

countries.q: Which countries do your candidates come from?
countries.a: We connect talent developed in Nepal with companies in Korea and Japan. Our current network focuses on five countries: Nepal, Vietnam, Laos, Republic of Korea, and Japan.

trust.q: Can a new company be trusted?
trust.a: We disclose only verifiable facts rather than unconfirmed placement counts or rankings. Our work is based on a cooperative system that includes MOUs with five organizations in Nepal.

training.title: Local vocational training
training.desc: We provide job, language, and cultural education locally first, improving candidates’ readiness before companies meet them.

koreaVisa.title: Korean work visas
koreaVisa.desc: We design hiring procedures for the E-9, E-7, D-2, and D-4 systems.

japanSsw.title: Japan’s Specified Skilled Worker program
japanSsw.desc: With a focus on caregiving and accommodation, we match candidates who have passed Japanese-language and skills examinations.

process.title: We manage one continuous journey from selection to settlement
process.description: We group seven stages into three phases so companies can easily understand who checks what and when.
process.alt: Document image representing visa and contract procedures

localPreparation.title: Local preparation
localPreparation.desc: Rather than sending candidates immediately after recruitment, we first confirm job readiness, language ability, and cultural adaptation.

matching.title: Company matching
matching.desc: We review company and regulatory requirements together, then move on to contract and visa procedures.

afterArrival.title: After arrival
afterArrival.desc: We continue living support and administrative checks after placement to reduce settlement risk.

japan.label: Preparation for caregiving and accommodation work in Japan

partnerCards.title: We describe partner organizations through their roles and responsibilities
partnerCards.description: Until permission to use a logo is granted, we do not create a temporary one. We display only the actual roles each organization performs.

richhood.name: Richhood Overseas
richhood.desc: MOU partner for worker selection, qualification verification, and immigration administration

sunkoshi.name: Sunkoshi Manpower Service
sunkoshi.desc: Nepal Ministry of Labour-authorized overseas employment agency and MOU partner

satyawati.name: Satyawati Overseas Concern
satyawati.desc: MOU partner for selecting and sending workers to Korea and Japan

bhairav.name: Bhairav Industrial Skills Hub
bhairav.desc: MOU partner for welding-focused vocational education and student recruitment

ocean.name: Ocean Technical Institute
ocean.desc: MOU partner for vocational and language training and pre-departure education

koreaHousing.name: Korea Housing Construction Association
koreaHousing.desc: Connecting workforce demand in the housing-construction industry

cta.title: Let us first confirm your company’s requirements
cta.description: Tell us the role, headcount, preferred timeline, and visa direction, and we will outline the available process and preparation order.
cta.alt: A meeting room and documents prepared for consultation

metadata.title: About us
metadata.description: Learn about Joong Woo HRD, a global human-resources development company that develops Nepali talent through local training and lawfully connects it with companies in Korea and Japan.

banner.context: From local training to settlement support
banner.title: About us
banner.description: We are a global human-resources development company that develops Nepali talent through local training and lawfully connects it with companies in Korea and Japan.

main.title: Talent should not simply be sent; it should be prepared

paragraphs.first: Joong Woo HRD begins with vocational training in Nepal. We lawfully connect talent equipped with job, language, and cultural skills to the requirements of companies in Korea and Japan.
paragraphs.second: In July 2026, we signed MOUs with five organizations in Nepal to strengthen cooperation for worker selection, qualification verification, education, and immigration administration.

metadata.title: Services
metadata.description: From vocational schools in Nepal and Korean work visas (E-9, E-7, D-2, D-4) to Japan’s Specified Skilled Worker program: Joong Woo HRD’s three core service areas and one-stop process.

banner.context: Integrated operation of training, visas, and matching
banner.title: Services
banner.description: This is more than simple placement. We connect companies with verified talent through an integrated structure of local training, visas, and matching.

main.title: We design training-led development and system-led hiring together
main.descriptionBeforeVisa: The three service areas are not standalone products but one hiring-operation flow. Requirements and procedures for each system used in hiring are available in

metadata.title: Partnerships
metadata.description: International business MOUs were signed with five organizations in Nepal in July 2026. Three sending agencies and two vocational skills and education organizations share selection, verification, training, and immigration administration.

banner.title: Partnerships
banner.description: We build a flow of selection, training, sending, and matching by dividing roles with organizations in Nepal and Korea.

feature.title: International business MOUs signed with five organizations in Nepal
feature.description: On July 5, 2026, Joong Woo HRD signed separate MOUs with three local Nepali worker-sending agencies and two vocational skills and education organizations. The parties defined vocational education, employment links to Korea and Japan, job and language education, and detailed immigration procedures as areas of cooperation.

structure.title: MOU structure
structure.description: Three sending agencies plus two vocational skills and education organizations; separate MOUs with each

partnerRole.title: Partner roles
partnerRole.description: Worker selection and qualification verification, vocational skills, job, and language education, and immigration-related administrative support

joongwooRole.title: Joong Woo HRD’s role
joongwooRole.description: Developing and matching companies in Korea and Japan, and providing legal, labor, administrative, and accounting settlement support for arriving workers

mou.title: Five MOU partner organizations
mou.description: The group consists of three worker-sending agencies and two vocational skills and education organizations responsible for selection and training. Only facts verified through official registration are shown for each organization.

richhood.name: Richhood Overseas Inc. (P) Ltd.
richhood.description: Supports worker selection, qualification verification, and immigration-related administration.
richhood.basis: Registered with Nepal’s Office of Company Registrar (OCR); recognized sending organization by Japan’s OTIT and JITCO

sunkoshi.name: Sunkoshi Manpower Service Pvt. Ltd.
sunkoshi.description: Founded in 1995. Sends workers overseas, including to Korea and Japan.
sunkoshi.basis: OCR registration; licensed by Nepal’s Department of Foreign Employment (DoFE); recognized by OTIT and JITCO (Japan office)

satyawati.name: Satyawati Overseas Concern Pvt. Ltd.
satyawati.description: Cooperates on worker selection and sending for Korea and Japan.
satyawati.basis: OCR registration; recognized sending organization by Japan’s OTIT and JITCO

bhairav.name: Bhairav Industrial Skills Hub Pvt. Ltd.
bhairav.description: Operates welding-focused vocational skills education and identifies candidates for overseas employment.
bhairav.basis: Registered with Nepal’s Office of Company Registrar (OCR)

ocean.name: Ocean Technical Institute Pvt. Ltd.
ocean.description: Handles student recruitment, job and language education, and pre-departure education.
ocean.basis: Registered with Nepal’s Office of Company Registrar (OCR)

metadata.title: Trust and expertise
metadata.description: Why can a new company be trusted? Verified partnerships including MOUs with five organizations in Nepal, system and regulatory expertise, leadership and team expertise, and a transparent process.

banner.title: Trust standards
banner.description: Before making grand promises, we disclose verifiable facts, regulatory standards, and cooperative roles.
banner.alt: Field image illustrating Trust and expertise

main.title: Trust comes from how we operate, not what we claim
main.description: Because we are a new company, we speak more narrowly and clearly. We disclose only verifiable partnerships and the systems within our scope.
main.alt: A meeting scene reviewing processes and principles

partnership.title: Verified partnerships
partnership.description: On July 5, 2026, we signed MOUs with five local organizations in Nepal and established a cooperative system for worker selection, qualification verification, education, and immigration administration.

regulation.title: Checking systems and regulations
regulation.description: We review Korea’s E-9, E-7, D-2, and D-4 and Japan’s Specified Skilled Worker No. 1 against official government standards.

network.title: Leadership and local network
network.description: A team led by CEO Oh Je-hwan and supported by a local cooperation network shares responsibility for selection, training, visas, and settlement.

process.title: Transparent process
process.description: We explain each stage’s roles, schedule, required documents, costs, and procedures in advance and clearly divide responsibilities.

refusals.title: What we do not do
refusals.description: We operate in accordance with labor and immigration laws in Korea, Japan, and Nepal.

items.fees: Collect excessive fees that violate sending-country regulations
items.abuse: Human trafficking, illegal brokerage, or violations of labor rights
items.misinformation: Unverified visa guidance or exaggerated promises

metadata.title: Contact
metadata.description: Ask about foreign-worker recruitment or partnerships. Tell us your company’s requirements and we will guide you to suitable talent and procedures.

banner.context: Starting with the role, headcount, and timeline
banner.title: Contact
banner.description: Foreign-worker recruitment requires confirming the role, headcount, schedule, and visa direction first.

main.title: Let us organize the necessary facts before the consultation
main.description: Web-form submission is not yet in operation. We first provide company information and items to prepare for a consultation.

form.description: This screen does not send your information yet. Until a formal intake channel is confirmed, it first explains the information companies should prepare.

preparationItems.locationAndHousing: Work location and whether housing support is available
